items.title: Stem-cell therapy reverses type 1 diabetes in groundbreaking case study
items.excerpt: A woman with type 1 diabetes started producing her own insulin less than 3 months after receiving an injection of a stem-cell derived treatment. She remained free from insulin injections 1 year after treatment.

items.title: Children’s daily sugar consumption halves just a year after tax, study finds
items.excerpt: The amount of sugar consumed by children from soft drinks in the UK halved within a year of the sugar tax being introduced, a study has found.
